title: OAI-PMH Metadata Harvesting Examples
description: Example requests demonstrating OAI-PMH 2.0 verbs for harvesting PANGAEA dataset metadata in various formats.

examples.title: Identify Repository
examples.description: Retrieve information about the PANGAEA repository.

examples.title: List Available Metadata Formats
examples.description: Retrieve all metadata formats supported by the PANGAEA OAI-PMH endpoint.

examples.title: List Dataset Sets
examples.description: Retrieve all OAI sets (topic categories) available for selective harvesting.

examples.title: Harvest Records in Dublin Core Format
examples.description: Retrieve all records modified since 2024-01-01 in Dublin Core XML format.

examples.title: Get Single Record in JSON-LD Format
examples.description: Retrieve a specific PANGAEA dataset record in JSON-LD / Schema.org format.

examples.title: Harvest Ocean Atmosphere Topic Records
examples.description: Retrieve records from the topicOceanAtmosphere set in DataCite 4 format.
